name: Oracular smoke ob3ect: capnomancy — divination by reading smoke patterns rising from a sacred fire or incense. FSPLIT: the fire splits the solid offering (herbs, resins, woods) into smoke (the visible message) and ash (the spent residue). FFUSE: the seer interprets the smoke's shape, direction, thickness, and color, reconstituting the scattered visual signals into a prophetic message. VINIT: the unlit kindling and unburned incense. TANCH: the brazier or censer as container. AFWD: smoke rising straight and strong (auspicious). AREV: smoke descending or blowing back toward the seer (warning, blockage). ENGAGR: smoke that forms a shape recognizable as two contradictory omens simultaneously.

phase_0.domain_name: Oracular smoke ob3ect: capnomancy — divination by reading smoke patterns rising from a sacred fire or incense. FSPLIT: the fire splits the solid offering (herbs, resins, woods) into smoke (the visible message) and ash (the spent residue). FFUSE: the seer interprets the smoke's shape, direction, thickness, and color, reconstituting the scattered visual signals into a prophetic message. VINIT: the unlit kindling and unburned incense. TANCH: the brazier or censer as container. AFWD: smoke rising straight and strong (auspicious). AREV: smoke descending or blowing back toward the seer (warning, blockage). ENGAGR: smoke that forms a shape recognizable as two contradictory omens simultaneously.
phase_0.boundary_condition: the brazier or censer that contains the fire and defines the ritual space

VINIT.justification: void/uninitialized state before any combustion or reading occurs

TANCH.justification: terminal anchor that contains the entire system and its transformations

AREV.chosen_element: smoke descending or blowing back toward the seer

CLINK.chosen_element: sequential observation of smoke patterns over time
CLINK.justification: composition of multiple visual cues into a coherent reading

IMSCRIB.justification: identity/self-ref: the seer knows themselves as the one who reads the signs

FSPLIT.chosen_element: the fire splitting the solid offering
FSPLIT.justification: splits the solid offering into smoke (visible message) and ash (spent residue)

FFUSE.chosen_element: the seer interpreting the smoke's shape, direction, thickness, and color
FFUSE.justification: reconstitutes scattered visual signals into a prophetic message

EVALT.chosen_element: a clear, auspicious omen (e.g., straight rising smoke)

EVALF.chosen_element: a negative omen (e.g., smoke descending or choking)

ENGAGR.chosen_element: smoke forming a shape recognizable as two contradictory omens simultaneously
ENGAGR.justification: paradox: both auspicious and inauspicious held together

IFIX.chosen_element: the seer's written or spoken record of the omen
IFIX.justification: permanent irreversible record of the divination

phase_2.split_element: the fire splitting the solid offering
phase_2.fuse_element: the seer interpreting the smoke's shape, direction, thickness, and color
phase_2.fuse_result: prophetic message (reconstituted from smoke and ash as a whole)

phase_3.void_description: unlit kindling and unburned incense before any ritual action
phase_3.true_description: smoke rising straight and strong — auspicious omen
phase_3.false_description: smoke descending or blowing back — warning or blockage
phase_3.both_description: smoke forming a shape that is both auspicious and inauspicious simultaneously

steps.domain_action: Step 1 IMSCRIB: the seer acknowledges themselves as the interpreter
Step 2 AREV: the seer prepares the fire and offering, descending into the ritual
Step 3 FSPLIT: the fire splits the offering into smoke and ash
Step 4 AFWD: the smoke rises, carrying the message upward
Step 5 FFUSE: the seer interprets the smoke patterns, fusing them into a prophetic message
Step 6 CLINK: the seer links multiple observations over time into a coherent reading
Step 7 IFIX: the seer records the omen permanently (written or spoken)
Step 8 IMSCRIB: the seer closes the ritual, recognizing the completed reading

phase_5.compiler_frontend: the ritual protocol that translates the seer's intention into the act of offering and reading
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: the smoke and ash as carriers of information between fire and seer
phase_5.memory_mechanism: the seer's memory and written records of past omens
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: the timing of the fire's burning and the seer's observation cycle
phase_5.alfs_store: the canonical corpus of capnomancy lore and interpretation rules

phase_6.cycle_cost: the solid offering consumed by fire
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: unlit kindling and unburned incense, seer's unformed intention
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the offering's material entropy increase is balanced by the seer's interpretive work and record, preserving informational structure
